title: Process Engineer Vacancy at TVS Motor - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at TVS Motor - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
TVS Motor is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About TVS Motor:
TVS Motor is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor!
